channel_thesis: Start with warm introductions from the family member to local HVAC owners because trust and direct owner access matter more than reach for a concierge missed-call recovery offer.
primary_channel: Warm introductions to HVAC owners through a family member's local network.
supporting_channels: Referral compounding from successful warm conversations and pilots.
Lightweight proof assets that make the intro and owner conversation easier.
Narrow referred-adjacent outbound only after warm proof exists.
sequence: Validate 10-15 real reachable owners through the family member.
Run discovery calls focused on missed-call pain and booking leakage.
Make pilot offers to best-fit owners.
Add narrow local follow-up outbound only after proof.
kill_criteria: Fewer than 5 intros are actually available
Under 25% of warm intros become owner conversations after 10 intros
Owners repeatedly do not see the pain as urgent
The warm source does not send intros within 2 weeks
